item.title: Major change coming to JobSeeker after years of ‘inefficiencies’
item.description: The reforms mark the system’s first overhaul in three decades.

item.title: Renewed call for Indigenous Voice to Parliament during Reconciliation Week
item.description: One thing has become increasingly clear since the referendum in 2023, say Uluru Dialogue co-chairs.

item.title: Customers caught up in ticketing reshuffle as Come Alive! The Greatest Showman Circus Spectacular comes to Australia
item.description: Attendees claim seats to the popular live show were moved back and some families were separated across venues.

item.title: Heartwarming moment rescue team celebrates after survivors discovered in Laos cave
item.description: The five villagers were trapped in a flooded cave for eight days before a Thai rescue crew located them.

item.title: Pat Cummins and Travis Head miss out on IPL final after Vaibhav Sooryavanshi powers Rajasthan Royals to victory
item.description: The freakish teenager has once again left the cricket world speechless.

item.title: Tax changes defended by Labor higher-ups despite criticism from state leaders
item.description: Two state premiers have now broken ranks and urged the government to change course.

item.title: Eleven feared dead in US chemical tank rupture as search moves from rescue to recovery
item.description: ‘We’re bracing ourselves for this being the deadliest industrial tragedy in modern Washington state history.’

item.title: Residents warned of powerful weather event forecast to impact Western Australia’s coast
item.description: It is likely to bring damaging winds, heavy rainfall and possible six-metre waves.

item.title: Woman fronts court after alleged tip jar and charity box theft spree in Queensland
item.description: ‘It’s just so many of them,’ a magistrate said while refusing the woman bail.

item.title: Supercars referee Craig Baird cops whack for publicly shaming ‘grub’ driver Ryan Wood
item.description: The respected official has been forced to issue a public statement after crossing a line.

item.title: Australian Josh Richards flying to Laos to rescue survivors trapped in flooded cave
item.description: The experienced diver concedes he is ‘scared’ as rescue teams battle dangerous conditions.

item.title: Australian ‘looksmaxxer’ influencer Androgenic removed from Jetstar flight after cosmetic surgery in Thailand
item.description: ‘You’re swelling right now, your eyes ... Your face is very ill.’

item.title: Middle East war: Peace deal between Iran and US hinges on Donald Trump’s signature
item.description: The cost of oil is predicted ‘come down very quickly’ once a deal is finalised.

item.title: Singer Susan Boyle teases new single Just One and debuts bold new look
item.description: The Scottish musician rose to fame when her 2009 audition for Britain’s Got Talent went viral.

item.title: Blue Origin rocket explodes into massive fireball during latest engine test
item.description: The rocket was being prepared to launch satellites for Amazon’s internet network.

item.title: F1 obsessed scientists name ancient wasp species after Oscar Piastri
item.description: The biologists just couldn’t help themselves after they found the preserved, ancient species.

item.title: Benjamin Netanyahu tasks Israeli army with taking 70 per cent of Gaza Strip
item.description: ‘Let’s start with that.’

item.title: Frustrated parents accuse Roblox of normalising gambling for young children
item.description: ‘I don’t think personally they should even be allowed to spend there. At their age they don’t know what is good or bad.’

item.title: Prince Haakon of Norway shares update on his wife Princess Mett-Marit’s chronic lung condition
item.description: The princess confirmed she was diagnosed with the incurable disease in 2018.

item.title: First Nations designers reclaim their place at Australian Fashion Week
item.description: The historic return of the Reclamation Runway showcases a powerful story ‘for everyone’.

item.title: Officeworks moves Australian jobs to India and Philippines as part of ‘significant’ transformation
item.description: The company claims the move will help keep prices low for customers.

item.title: EOFY NBN and internet plans you can’t afford to miss
item.description: EOFY deals on NBN are heating up with major providers offering big discounts.

item.title: X creator push exposes pay gap facing Australian creators and publishers
item.description: The new X Creator Connect raises questions about Australian creator income, TikTok monetisation and payments.

item.title: Former prime minister Tony Abbott named federal Liberal Party president
item.description: ‘I regard it as my duty to serve the party in this time of existential crisis.’

item.title: Australian study challenges forgetfulness and mental fog known as ‘baby brain’ in mums and dads after childbirth
item.description: Researchers warn the powerful social narrative could become a self-fulfilling prophecy.

item.title: First survivor is safely out of flooded cave in Laos, rescue diver says
item.description: A multinational team is set to help the remaining villagers on Saturday after more than a week trapped.

item.title: MND cases rising in Australia as researchers hunt for breakthrough treatments
item.description: The death of AFL great Neale Daniher from motor neurone disease and NRL player Jai Arrow's diagnosis have thrust the cruel condition back into the spotlight.

item.title: Helicopter pilot breaks long silence on F1 legend Michael Schumacher’s mountain rescue
item.description: ‘When the commander ordered us to remove our microphones ... I understood that it was true.’

item.title: Bus driver to face charges after deadly crash involving vehicles slowed for work zone on US highway
item.description: A car burst into flames and dozens of passengers were rushed to hospital after the bus slammed into vehicles slowing for roadworks.

item.title: Three climbers killed after fall near Denali Pass on Alaska’s Mount McKinley
item.description: A fourth mountaineer was dramatically rescued by helicopter after the group plunged along one of the peak’s most dangerous routes.

item.title: Diesel boost on the water for bottlenecked Queensland regions
item.description: Regional servos are expected to receive extra fuel as authorities scramble to ease mounting pressure on supplies.

item.title: Vivid performances scrapped after drones fall from sky in Sydney performance
item.description: ‘Public safety will always remain the highest priority.’

item.title: Troubled singer Britney Spears talks of ‘emotional issues’ after arrest over reckless driving
item.description: ‘This year has been quite interesting.’

item.title: Canadian Kenneth Law pleads guilty to 14 counts of aiding deaths by selling lethal substances online
item.description: The Canadian man is accused of sending at least 1200 packages to more than 40 countries including New Zealand.

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: Iran war risks sparking a nuclear dash as conflict with the US drags on
item.description: ‘What’s really frustrating is that it was predictable.’

item.title: Trapped villagers freed from Laos cave after 10 days underground, two remain missing
item.description: Video captured the emotional moment mud-soaked villagers emerged from the cave.

item.title: Champion jockey James McDonald equals 45-year-old record with latest Group 1 triumph
item.description: The superstar has added yet another accolade to his growing list.

item.title: Marquinhos consoles Arsenal’s Gabriel Magalhaes after shootout miss hands Champions League title to PSG
item.description: The skipper put his own celebrations on hold to check on the rival whose horror penalty ended the match.

item.title: Cameron Green spun out for a duck as Aussies fall short in first ODI against Pakistan
item.description: The allrounder and Marnus Labuschagne were bamboozled by a teenage debutant and their struggles proved crucial to the result.

item.title: Mexico ‘blow up deluxe’ as Socceroos scuffle over sly tactic late in 1-0 defeat to World Cup co-hosts
item.description: ‘World Cup tension’ was in the air after Mexico pounced with the referee’s back turned.

item.title: Richard Marles reveals US submarines AUKUS savings as Australia opts for secondhand submarines
item.description: The government says a major change to the plans will simplify the fleet.

item.title: Luxury Escapes launches nationwide search for ‘Travel Tester’ role worth $50,000
item.description: Luxury Escapes’ ‘Travel Tester’ will be paid to travel the world, stay in resorts and bring a plus one along for the ride.

item.title: Experts call for further research into brain fog symptoms in menopause
item.description: Many women experience varying degrees of forgetfulness, attention or concentration difficulties.

item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.description: ‘Being able to come out of this alive is an immense source of happiness.’

item.description: The Indian master struck the winning runs but only after a veteran bowler proved why he’s the worldwide master of finals cricket.

item.description: The Matildas star lifted the trophy on a day her opponent’s Australian coach and his late father were in everyone’s hearts.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Hantavirus cruise ship given the green light to set sail again after disinfection
item.description: Authorities cleared the Hondius for service, adding that there was no longer any risk of infection.

item.title: 7NEWS live updates: Footage released of man firing several bullets at a Melbourne home
item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: Residents and tourists rattled by double explosion at Maltese fireworks factory
item.description: Shocking footage circulating online captured the moment the 1.9 magnitude blast shook the surrounding area.

item.title: Rugby league legend John Kear dies hours after finishing Challenge Cup broadcast
item.description: The champion coach and veteran commentator had only just returned home when he died suddenly.

item.title: Serena Williams confirms tennis comeback at Queen’s Club aged 44
item.description: ‘The perfect place to begin ⁠this ‌next chapter.’

item.title: Kenyans protest planned Ebola quarantine station for US citizens
item.description: ‘We are picketing for our lives.’

item.title: Honda Super-One priced from under $30,000 in Japan
item.description: The Honda Super-One electric hatch is now on sale in its home market ahead of its late-2026 arrival here, priced from the equivalent of A$29,600.

item.title: Farmer Wants A Wife 2026: Apple farmer Zac reveals his search for love as life gets tough
item.description: ‘Something as little as hail damage on one day can change everything.’

item.title: Iran-US peace negotiations falter as ceasefire on shaky ground
item.description: Ongoing peace talks hinge on Israel and Hezbollah maintaining a precarious ceasefire agreement.

item.title: Christian and Bella Petracca announce ‘baby boy on the way’
item.description: The Gold Coast superstar and social media cooking sensation is about to enter a new chapter.

item.title: Melbourne urged to drop Harrison Petty after ‘concerning’ performance against GWS Giants
item.description: ‘He has so many goals kicked on him or the team kicks a goal as a result of his mistake.’

item.title: Cost-of-living crisis pushes foster carers to breaking point: ‘Should not have to fight for shoes and clothing’
item.description: Desperate families say the few hundred dollars they get each week is nowhere near enough to give children the lives they deserve.

item.title: Almost three million Australian workers to receive pay boost following annual wage review
item.description: Here’s how much extra employees on minimum wage and industry awards will pocket.

item.title: 2026 Volkswagen Tayron eHybrid review
item.description: The larger of VW's new PHEV SUVs offers noticeably more size and space for less cash than the Tiguan, with similar performance and EV range.

item.title: World No.104 Matteo Arnaldi producing late-night miracle to defeat Frances Tiafoe at French Open
item.description: The marathon man outlasted the 19th seed in another five-set pic to continue his remarkable run.

item.title: Essendon, Carlton and Tasmania urged to sound out Justin Longmuir in coach search
item.description: The most obvious candidate for the Essendon, Carlton and Tasmania jobs is hiding in plain sight.

item.title: Toyota fights back against BYD with extra stock, higher 2026 sales forecast
item.description: And the Australian auto market leader has also landed its first PHEV, based on the nation’s top-selling SUV, earlier than expected.

item.title: Patagonia launches trademark lawsuit against drag queen and activist Pattie Gonia
item.description: In January, the company launched a trademark infringement lawsuit against Pattie Gonia.

item.title: Federal government sanctions extremist West Bank settler farms in response to ongoing violence
item.description: ‘The individuals and entities sanctioned today have undermined Israel’s own security and its standing in the world.’

item.title: ‘Disastrous’ prediction for thousands of new homeowners amid market downturn
item.description: ‘For those that have recently bought, it’s a very real danger.’

item.title: Adelaide draftee Hugo Hall-Kahan in shock after surprise debut confirmed
item.description: The 22-year-old shed a few tears as his dream was realised, just seven days after joining the club.

item.title: Alfa Romeo Giulietta, Tonale replacements detailed further by Stellantis
item.description: Stellantis Europe's COO has shed more light on Alfa Romeo's upcoming compact models, as well as the future of the Giulia and Stelvio hero models.

item.title: James Van Der Beek’s ex-wife Heather McComb remarries four months after the actor’s death
item.description: The 49-year-old was married to the Dawson’s Creek star from 2003 to 2010.

item.title: Brisbane injury crisis deepens as Keidean Coleman set for six weeks on sidelines
item.description: The Lions will be without another one of their key playmakers for a big chunk of the season.

item.title: James Boags beer production to end in Tasmania after 140 years and move to mainland
item.description: The company said dozens of jobs will be impacted.

item.title: Consumer watchdog investigates online sales of potentially deadly magnetic toys at Amazon, eBay, Kogan
item.description: Banned items have been found in a range of toys sold by major retailers.

item.title: Tennis icon John McEnroe counting down until to return home from French Open ahead of NBA Finals
item.description: ‘The time has come. I’ve been waiting only 53 years.’

item.title: Seven dead including gunman after series of shootings in Muscatine, Iowa
item.description: A preliminary investigation indicated the killings ‘stemmed from a domestic-related dispute’.

item.title: Residents feared trapped under rubble as Kyiv homes targeted in major Russian strikes
item.description: Dozens of people including children have been wounded in the large-scale attack.

item.title: Parents of murdered teen Angus Beaumont share update after Clontarf house fire
item.description: The blaze ripped through three homes and was allegedly started by their son’s half-brother.

item.title: Toyota unveils hottest GR Corolla yet, locks in Australian launch
item.description: Toyota has a new hardcore GRMN model coming to Australia, with a lighter, tuned-up version of the GR Corolla arriving in 2027.

item.title: Clean-up efforts continue in WA after powerful storm leaves thousands without power
item.description: Emergency response crews are continuing to address a significant number of hazards.

item.title: Manly Sea Eagles confirm Kieran Foran as permanent coach
item.description: The 35-year-old has put pen to paper on a three-year deal.

item.title: Brisbane elderly couple rushed to hospital after suspected gas cylinder explosion in car
item.description: A gas cylinder is believed to have been the cause.

item.title: Caroline Wilson slams Steven King and Damien Hardwick for Northern Territory comments
item.description: ‘That was not the time to publicly distance yourself from future deals.’

item.title: Young Essendon defender Lewis Hayes ruptures ACL in first game back from same injury
item.description: The club has issued a statement and says its wrapping its arms around the 21-year-old.

item.title: Man rushed to hospital after electrocution at worksite in Carole Park, Ipswich
item.description: Multiple police and fire trucks were called to assist.

item.title: Brisbane coach Michael Maguire drops Ezra Mam from team to face Gold Coast at Suncorp Stadium
item.description: The reigning premiers’ season is in all sorts and the coach has been forced to take serious action.

item.title: Queensland’s e-bike and e-scooter laws watered down
item.description: Controversial e-reforms are expected to pass parliament this week, with new penalties coming into force as early as July 1.
